name: Reign
bio: Reign is a warrior defined by legacy, burden, and evolution. Once an orphan soldier overshadowed by his elder brother Solas—the famed diplomat known as the Silver Tongue—Reign forged his own legend in the fires of rebellion and war. Initially guided by vengeance and guilt after Solas' death, Reign's journey matured into a quest for justice, unity, and hope.

Wielding his brother's sword, Reign mended it through training with the mountain clans, transforming it into ThunderStrike, a weapon that channels his will into crackling lightning. As a leader of the Last Bastion, he commands respect not through power alone, but through empathy and sacrifice.
Leads the Last Bastion through the climactic battles, ultimately defeating Vector with the reforged blade Thunderstrike, and becomes known afterward as the Warden of Valkorath.
